strengths: Comprehensive API contracts defined for all endpoints
Clear acceptance criteria mapped to user stories
Detailed implementation steps with code examples
Research phase identified key patterns and blockers
Risk levels explicitly stated for each dependency
Testing strategy defined at multiple levels (unit, integration, e2e)

concerns.issue: Race condition potential during setInterval collection
concerns.recommendation: Implement mutex/lock on metrics buffer OR use queue-based approach
concerns.impact: Data duplication or loss in metrics if collection overlaps
concerns.suggested_fix: Use p-queue or bull for job queue management

concerns.issue: 2-second timeout may be too short depending on network latency
concerns.recommendation: Make timeout configurable via environment variable
concerns.impact: Engine may appear unavailable when just slow
concerns.suggested_fix: Set ENGINE_HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS env var with 2000ms default

concerns.issue: No caching strategy defined for aggregation queries
concerns.impact: Potential performance issue with frequent analytics requests

concerns.issue: Switching between core-config.yaml and team_members table may cause inconsistency
concerns.recommendation: Define clear priority order: DB first, config fallback
concerns.suggested_fix: Document priority in API contract: 'Reads from team_members table; falls back to core-config.yaml if empty'

concerns.issue: Generic error handling pattern not specified
concerns.suggested_fix: Create ApiError interface: { error: string; code: string; statusCode: number }

blockers.title: Phase 0 - Foundation (Supabase setup required)
blockers.description: NO stories can start until Phase 0 is complete: .env files, Supabase credentials, team_members table migration, RLS configuration

blockers.title: SystemMetricsCollector verification
blockers.description: Must verify SystemMetricsCollector exists in codebase and works correctly before stories 3.13+ can start

blockers.title: All Phase 0-2 endpoints must exist
blockers.description: Stories 3.10-3.16 must complete before story 3.17 can properly test integration

story_critiques.title: Agent Metrics Real-Time
comments: ✅ Clear acceptance criteria
✅ API contract well-defined
✅ Hook pattern familiar and testable
⚠️ Consider: Add max_retries parameter for failed API calls
⚠️ Consider: Document polling behavior when tab is inactive (CPU impact)
story_critiques.test_coverage: Good - unit, integration, E2E tests defined
story_critiques.risks: Low - familiar React patterns, no data persistence

story_critiques.title: Stories & Squads Real Reading
comments: ✅ Two data sources handled with fallback pattern
✅ Implementation pattern matches existing code
⚠️ Need: Clear documentation on squad data source priority
⚠️ Recommendation: Add caching for file system reads (YAML parsing is slow)
story_critiques.test_coverage: Good - file I/O, parsing, component rendering tested
story_critiques.risks: Medium - multiple data sources could cause inconsistency

story_critiques.title: GitHub Integration
comments: ✅ Simple, focused scope
✅ Clear environment variable contract
✅ Fallback to hardcoded defaults sensible
✅ Low risk, high value
story_critiques.test_coverage: Good - env variable loading, fallback behavior tested

story_critiques.title: Engine/Tasks/Workflows
comments: ✅ Clear refactoring target for 3 services
✅ Health check pattern well-documented
⚠️ Engine health check timeout should be configurable
⚠️ Consider: Add retry logic for engine health check
⚠️ Test coverage should include timeout scenarios
story_critiques.test_coverage: Adequate - timeout handling, graceful degradation, empty directory cases
story_critiques.risks: Medium - engine availability detection critical; timeout issues could impact visibility

story_critiques.title: Hand-offs Monitoring
comments: ✅ Clear file-based data source
✅ Handoff artifact format familiar (YAML)
✅ Real-time monitoring capability valuable
⚠️ Performance: Monitor file system watch performance with many handoffs
story_critiques.test_coverage: Good - directory reading, YAML parsing, real-time sync tested
story_critiques.risks: Low - straightforward file I/O with clear data format

story_critiques.title: Agent Memory Visualization
comments: ✅ Complex hierarchical structure handled well
✅ Frontmatter parsing documented
✅ Content preview truncation prevents huge payloads
⚠️ Consider: Add search/filter capability for large memory trees
⚠️ Performance: Test with 100+ memory files
story_critiques.test_coverage: Good - file traversal, YAML frontmatter parsing, content preview tested
story_critiques.risks: Low-Medium - YAML parsing complexity, potential for large payloads

story_critiques.title: Missing Analytics & Routes
comments: ✅ 5 new endpoints clearly specified
✅ Hardcoded agent list sensible for MVP
⚠️ Analytics aggregation queries performance not analyzed
⚠️ No caching strategy defined (recommendation: Redis)
⚠️ Consider: Add database indexes on performance-critical queries
⚠️ Consider: Time window parameter validation in performance endpoint
story_critiques.test_coverage: Adequate - endpoint responses, data aggregation, edge cases tested
story_critiques.risks: Medium - aggregation queries may be slow; caching critical for production

story_critiques.title: Complete Data Integration
comments: ✅ Comprehensive scope: 11 components, metrics persistence, real data wiring
✅ Implementation order well-defined (CRITICAL)
✅ Performance considerations included
⚠️ HIGH: Race condition risk in metrics collection batch logic (needs mutex)
⚠️ HIGH: 11 component refactoring creates large regression risk
⚠️ MEDIUM: No rollback strategy if metrics collection fails
⚠️ MEDIUM: Component interdependencies not fully mapped
⚠️ Recommendation: Break into smaller sub-stories (3.17a, 3.17b, 3.17c) to reduce risk
⚠️ Testing: Need performance regression test baseline BEFORE implementation
story_critiques.test_coverage: Good in theory but LARGE surface area - recommend additional E2E testing
story_critiques.risks: High - Large scope, 11 components touched, metrics persistence critical, performance regression risk

strengths: Each story has defined test strategy
Edge cases identified (timeouts, empty responses, errors)
gaps: Story 3.17 needs more rigorous E2E scenario coverage (11 components)
No load testing strategy defined for analytics aggregation (story 3.16)
Browser compatibility testing not mentioned (dashboard stories)
recommendations: Add load testing for analytics aggregation queries
Add browser compatibility matrix (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
Add regression test baseline for story 3.17 before/after metrics collection
Add security testing for API endpoints (injection, authentication, authorization)

strengths: Consistent API response format across all endpoints
Phase-based implementation order aligns with architecture
Separation of concerns respected (services, hooks, components)
concerns: No mention of logging/monitoring strategy for new endpoints
No mention of rate limiting for analytics endpoints
No mention of authentication/authorization (assumed no auth needed?)

phase_2_routes.note: All Phase 1 endpoints must exist before Phase 2 aggregation

gate_1_requirements_completeness.evidence: All AC have clear, measurable, testable conditions

gate_2_api_contracts.check: Are all API endpoints fully specified?
gate_2_api_contracts.evidence: Request/response schemas defined, query params documented

gate_3_data_honesty.check: Will implementation never return fake data?
gate_3_data_honesty.evidence: Anti-mentira principle stated, but needs verification during code review
gate_3_data_honesty.concern: Requires @dev to follow spec exactly - will be verified in code review

gate_4_test_strategy.check: Is test strategy adequate for complexity?
gate_4_test_strategy.caveat: Story 3.17 needs additional coverage due to large scope

gate_5_risk_identification.check: Are risks identified and mitigation planned?
gate_5_risk_identification.evidence: Research phase identified blockers, concerns documented
gate_5_risk_identification.concern: Story 3.17 race condition and regression risk need explicit mitigation

critical.title: Story 3.17 - Implement mutex for metrics collection
critical.why: Prevent race condition during setInterval batch logic

critical.title: Phase 0 - Foundation must complete before ANY story
critical.why: All stories depend on Supabase setup and credentials
critical.how: Allocate 2 hours to Phase 0; verify with curl test

high.title: Story 3.13 - Make engine health check timeout configurable
high.why: 2 seconds may be too short in slow networks
high.how: Add ENGINE_HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS env var with 2000 default

high.title: Story 3.17 - Consider breaking into 3 sub-stories
high.why: 11 components touching + metrics persistence = large regression risk

high.title: Story 3.16 - Implement caching for analytics queries
high.why: Aggregation queries may be slow with large datasets
high.how: Add Redis caching layer with 5-minute TTL

medium.title: All stories - Define standardized error response format
medium.how: Define ApiError interface in shared types

medium.title: Dashboard stories - Add accessibility testing
medium.how: Add axe/pa11y tests; validate color contrast ratios

medium.title: Analytics endpoint - Document database indexes needed
medium.how: Add migration for indexes on (agent_id, collected_at)

specification_sign_off.final_recommendation: Proceed to implementation with following conditions:
conditions: 2. Story 3.17 scope: consider breaking into 3 sub-stories to reduce risk
3. Critical concerns (metrics mutex, health check timeout, caching) must be addressed in code review
4. Implementation must follow anti-mentira principle: no fake data ever
5. Performance baseline test required for story 3.17 before/after metrics collection
specification_sign_off.readiness: 95% - Specifications are production-ready with noted concerns

notes: All specifications are APPROVED and ready for @architect to create implementation plans. Critical path identified: Phase 0 → Phase 1 (stories 3.10-3.15) → Phase 2 (story 3.16) → Phase 3 (story 3.17). Recommend parallel development of Phase 1 stories where possible.
